summary: A figure in classical robes stands on impossible Escher stairs holding a large burnt-orange scroll, hair pulled back in a bun, surrounded by paradoxical architectural frames.

pairs.see: The impossible staircase that ascends and descends simultaneously
pairs.represents: The methodological rigor of causal inference and identification strategies

pairs.see: The large burnt-orange scroll held prominently in both hands
pairs.represents: The annotated regression tables and working papers central to her work

pairs.see: Hair pulled back functionally in a bun
pairs.represents: Hair pulled back functionally, not fashionably, during focused work

pairs.see: The paradoxical architectural frames creating visual impossibility
pairs.represents: The causal diagrams and identification assumptions that structure analysis
